creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Thu Oct 17 18:21:55 2013
New Revision: 330662
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/330662

Log:
  - Update from 0.5.4 to 0.5.5
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - Add stage support
  
  PR:		ports/183049
  Submitted by:	Luca Pizzamiglio <luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/audio/ctronome/Makefile
  head/audio/ctronome/distinfo

Modified: head/audio/ctronome/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/ctronome/Makefile	Thu Oct 17 18:06:40 2013	(r330661)
+++ head/audio/ctronome/Makefile	Thu Oct 17 18:21:55 2013	(r330662)
@@ -2,16 +2,15 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ctronome
-PORTVERSION=	0.5.4
+PORTVERSION=	0.5.5
 CATEGORIES=	audio
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ctronome.kign.org/source/
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Programmable console-based metronome
 
 LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/ctronome \
 		%%DATADIR%%/metronome1.wav \
 		%%DATADIR%%/metronome2.wav
@@ -22,9 +21,9 @@ post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/share/ctronome|${DATADIR}|' ${WRKSRC}/ctronome.h
 
 do-install:
-	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/ctronome ${PREFIX}/bin
-	${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/metronome1.wav ${DATADIR}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/metronome2.wav ${DATADIR}
+	${INSTALL_PROGRAM} ${WRKSRC}/ctronome ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/bin
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/metronome1.wav ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/metronome2.wav ${STAGEDIR}${DATADIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/audio/ctronome/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/ctronome/distinfo	Thu Oct 17 18:06:40 2013	(r330661)
+++ head/audio/ctronome/distinfo	Thu Oct 17 18:21:55 2013	(r330662)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ctronome-0.5.4.tar.gz) = 337632036867e432e938c5bbfacf1e993994dedc32674ecd04eadc6e5090ef78
-SIZE (ctronome-0.5.4.tar.gz) = 26102
+SHA256 (ctronome-0.5.5.tar.gz) = 6666fb380e76c5c3d26c43f84110abae1ca9193fc46ff285dca32d9e9cc9361e
+SIZE (ctronome-0.5.5.tar.gz) = 26402
